name: L2_refund_within_policy
description: Tier-1 refund (within 30 days since delivery). Order #1001 was delivered 5 days ago to customer C001 (Ada Lovelace). The skill mandates `refund_order` for this case - NOT store credit, NOT escalation. Tests that the agent (a) verifies customer + order before acting, (b) picks the correct ladder tier, (c) calls `refund_order` with the right id, (d) returns the refund_id + amount verbatim.

turns.message: Hi, this is C001. My order #1001 (Dune) arrived a few days ago but I ended up not wanting it. Can I get a refund?

llm_scorer_instruction: Verify the agent (1) confirmed the order belongs to C001 by consulting the MCP, (2) recognised this as a Tier-1 refund (delivered within 30 days), (3) called refund_order (NOT issue_store_credit, NOT escalate_to_human), (4) communicated the refund_id and the dollar amount to the customer.
